---
title: "test_gungnir_calculus_v2.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_gungnir_calculus_v2.py"
loc: 90
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.03
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 4.96
overall_score: 3.21
---

## Intent
The `test_gungnir_calculus_v2.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestGungnirCrucibleV2, setUp, test_calculus_10_metric_schema, test_bridge_hybrid_decision_logic, test_visual_mapping_fidelity. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestGungnirCrucibleV2, setUp, test_calculus_10_metric_schema, test_bridge_hybrid_decision_logic, test_visual_mapping_fidelity. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)

### Exports
- `TestGungnirCrucibleV2`
- `setUp`
- `test_calculus_10_metric_schema`
- `test_bridge_hybrid_decision_logic`
- `test_visual_mapping_fidelity`
